screenshots.sourceEvidenceText: Browser extensionBrowser extension A browser extension is a small software module that changes or extends a web browser. It can add interface controls, modify page behavior, or connect the browserBrowser extension A browser extension is a small software module that changes or extends a web browser. It can add interface controls, modify page behavior, or connect the browser已定位并高亮来源。

流程与操作Content scripts Content scripts run in the context of web pages and can inspect or alter the DOM of pages that match an extension's permissions and configuration. Work in an isolated world A content script uses an isolated JavaScript enviro已定位并高亮来源。
